entries.summary: Completed Next.js 14 to 15 upgrade. Fixed ssr:false build crash by extracting dynamic imports into 'use client' wrappers. Verified @supabase/ssr@0.9.0 integration, React 19 compatibility (build/type-check/lint/tests all pass), and ran full QA pass. Upgraded from next@14.2.35 + react@18 to next@15.5.15 + react@19.2.5.
lessons_learned: Next.js 15's ssr:false restriction in Server Components is the main build-breaking change — easily fixed with client wrapper pattern
React 19 was largely backward-compatible with this codebase (no breaking patterns like React.FC, defaultProps, or PropTypes)
@supabase/ssr@0.9.0 with getAll()/setAll() API is already Next.js 15 compatible — no migration needed
Evidence format requires taskId + required_gates + gates fields — plain notes-only JSON is rejected as 'corrupt'
